description: Repeated enum test pattern using GetEnumNames().Contains(). The identical 4-step template is copy-pasted for Position, IndividualOrder, Formation, Tactic, and TeamAttitude enums. Individual Has{Member}Member tests are fully redundant with AllMembersAreExpected.
suggestedFix: Extract a generic helper or remove individual member existence tests since AllMembersAreExpected already covers them.

description: Same pattern as PositionOrderEnumTests but using Enum.Parse() style. Individual member existence, HasExactlyNMembers, MembersHaveCorrectNames, AllMembers_CanBeEnumerated repeated for Specialty, PlayerPersonality, CoachType. AllMembers_CanBeEnumerated duplicates MembersHaveCorrectNames.
suggestedFix: Remove AllMembers_CanBeEnumerated methods which duplicate MembersHaveCorrectNames.

description: 17 individual numeric value tests each consisting of a single ((int)EnumType.Member).Should().Be(N) line. Same validation other files do in a single MembersHaveDefaultValues test.
suggestedFix: Replace with one test per enum that validates all values in a loop, matching TacticsFormationEnumTests.Formation_MembersHaveDefaultValues pattern.

description: Duplicate CanBeConvertedToString and CanBeCastFromInt tests repeated for 5 enums. Tests basic .NET enum runtime behavior.
suggestedFix: Remove or replace with a single generic helper.

description: Three identical CanBeIterated tests and three identical ValuesAreUniqueAndSequential tests following the same pattern per enum. Redundant with AllMembersAreExpected.
suggestedFix: Extract generic helper or remove since covered by other tests.

description: Three identical AllMembersAreDistinct tests creating HashSets to verify uniqueness. Enum values are guaranteed unique by C# compiler.
Three identical invalid parsing tests verifying Enum.Parse throws for 'InvalidMember'. Tests .NET framework behavior, not project code.
suggestedFix: Remove or consolidate to single generic test.
